title: ChatEvent
description: A single NDJSON event emitted on the `prevail chat --json` stream. One JSON object per line (newline-delimited JSON). The same shape is appended to the durable per-domain transcript at _threads/<id>.jsonl. Consumers MUST tolerate unknown event `type` values for forward compatibility.

type.description: Event kind. 'start' opens the turn; 'delta' carries a streamed text chunk; 'assistant' is the finalized reply; 'usage' reports token spend; 'done' closes the turn; 'error' reports failure.

thread.description: Thread id this event belongs to (maps to _threads/<thread>.jsonl).

ts.description: Epoch milliseconds when the event was emitted.

domain.description: Domain the chat is scoped to. Present on 'start'.

text.description: Text payload. On 'delta' this is the incremental chunk; on 'assistant'/'user' it is the full message.

engine.description: Engine that produced the reply, e.g. 'claude:opus-4-8'. Present on 'start' or 'assistant'.

error.description: Error message. Present only on 'error' events.
